vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:claude-code
vBRIEFInfo.description: PAN-977: Durable vBRIEF task graph control plane

plan.title: Durable vBRIEF task graph control plane
plan.author: agent:claude-code

narratives.Problem: Panopticon swarm execution needs a durable task graph rooted in vBRIEF so agents can answer next/show/claim/done/block without relying on Beads as the canonical source of truth.
narratives.Proposal: Add vBRIEF-native dispatch helpers, bounded active slices, persisted task operations with CAS and atomic writes, continue-state swarm runtime persistence, and pipeline mirror metadata while keeping SQLite authoritative for Phase 1 live runtime state.

items.title: Add vBRIEF-native task graph and persisted task operations

narrative.Action: Implement next/show/claim/done/block semantics on vBRIEF items, including CAS, single-writer ownership, atomic write-back to .pan/spec.vbrief.json, and blocked-item dispatch exclusion.

subItems.title: getDispatchableItems and task graph views exclude running, completed, cancelled, and blocked items
Task operations mutate plan item and subItem status durably with expected sequence checks
Plan writes use temp-file then rename and enforce one writer per worktree

items.title: Wire bounded active slices into work-agent prompts

narrative.Action: Generate work-agent prompt context from active vBRIEF slices by default and verify large-plan prompt-size reduction.

subItems.title: Prompt generation includes bounded target item, dependency, acceptance criteria, and synthesis context instead of full-plan payloads
Large outlier plan verification proves active slice payloads stay substantially smaller than full plan JSON

items.title: Mirror pipeline state into vBRIEF metadata with SQLite authority boundary

narrative.Action: Write schema-conforming plan.metadata.pipeline mirrors on Cloister status transitions while documenting SQLite remains authoritative for live Phase 1 state.

subItems.title: Nested pipeline mirror records verification, review, test, uat, merge, readyForMerge, and PR URL fields
pan-oversee and dashboard readers can use the mirror as corroborating input without replacing SQLite
